And the thing is, is it worked. It worked really well. Now, where it didn't work and where we failed these people is that we weren't able to give them the long-term success that they came here for. They came here for results and we gave that to them, but we gave it to them in a short-term package and we couldn't quite figure out what was hindering these people from having long-term success because that's really what I want to do. I want to be able to give long-term success. And what it was, it was this. The people's lives were here, right? Like, this is your life. The Nagefifus Academy was this block, right? It's about making those small tweaks and then keeping those things consistent and doing it in a way that's very achievable for you. It's like, have you ever heard the saying of eating an elephant can only be done one bite at a time? No. You have it? Okay. Well, basically, yeah, that's the same. She's like, nope, never does that. But basically it's the same, just saying that like most people have the fitness goal of I'm going to eat an elephant, right? I want to lose 60 pounds, I want to lose 50 pounds, I want to drop 25% bite that, I want to drop 20% bite that, and I want to do it in two months. And the reality is that in order to do this in a manner that's going to be sustainable in the long term is you want to set up a lifestyle that you love and then let the results be produced as a result of that. Does that make sense? Yes. Okay? And so we should be our focus as a facility from 100% from let's do it this way to now we do 100% life coaching. And so what that allows us to do is do individualized meals, individualized workouts, individualized accountability. It allows us to provide continuous support based on your needs and what kind of results you're getting. So the program is very much optimized for your individual lifestyle. And the reason we like to do that is because it gives us a much higher level of success with our clients because now we can make sure that the workouts fit your schedule on it, what you're eating fits your eating habits and that you can have a quality of life where you're never scared to eat a piece of cake again or you're never scared to eat carbohydrate again.
